subtasks.description: Generate SQL query to group licenses by publisher and compute total contract value, average cost per seat, and count of licenses per publisher

plan.cost_rationale: Single aggregation query with GROUP BY publisher. This is a straightforward multi-column aggregation requiring basic SQL (GROUP BY, SUM, AVG, COUNT) with no window functions, CTEs, or complex joins. Small tier is appropriate for this direct metric calculation from a single logical dataset.

output.sql: SELECT publisher, SUM(amount_usd) AS total_contract_value, SUM(amount_usd) / NULLIF(SUM(daily_active_seats), 0) AS avg_cost_per_seat, COUNT(DISTINCT license_id) AS license_count FROM consumption_facts GROUP BY publisher ORDER BY total_contract_value DESC
